name: Goblin
specialAbility: Nimble Escape: can Disengage or Hide as a bonus action
description: A small, cunning humanoid that fights dirty and flees when outmatched.

name: Wolf
specialAbility: Pack Tactics: advantage on attack if an ally is adjacent to the target
description: A large grey wolf with gleaming yellow eyes, hunting in packs through the Twilight Woods.

name: Cockatrice
specialAbility: Petrifying Bite: target must pass DC 11 CON save or be restrained for 1 turn
description: A bizarre creature with the body of a rooster and the tail of a lizard. Its bite can turn flesh to stone.

name: Skeleton
specialAbility: Undead Fortitude: drops to 1 HP instead of 0 once
description: An animated pile of bones held together by dark magic, armed with a rusty shortsword.

name: Shadow
specialAbility: Strength Drain: on hit, target's STR is reduced by 1 until rest
description: A wraith of living darkness that drains the life force of the living.

name: Giant Spider
specialAbility: Web: target must pass DC 11 STR check or be restrained
description: A horse-sized spider lurking in dark corners, spinning webs to trap prey.

name: Ghoul
specialAbility: Paralyzing Touch: target must pass DC 10 CON save or be paralyzed for 1 turn
description: An undead creature that feeds on corpses, its claws carry a paralyzing toxin.

name: Orc Warrior
specialAbility: Aggressive: can move its full speed toward a hostile target as a bonus action
description: A brutal fighter from the Shatterstone Wastes, wielding a massive greataxe.

name: Mimic
specialAbility: Shapechanger: disguised as a treasure chest; first attack has advantage
description: A creature that perfectly imitates a mining crate, striking when someone reaches inside.

name: Eclipsed Beast
specialAbility: Shadow Aura: all light sources within 30ft are dimmed; attacks from darkness have advantage
description: A monstrous entity of pure shadow, herald of the Eclipsed Eye. The final threat in the Greyspine depths.
